vocab.meaning: người có tinh thần đồng đội/biết hợp tác
vocab.example: Being part of a basketball squad taught me how to be a genuine team player, prioritizing group success over individual glory.

vocab.meaning: học cách làm một công việc/nắm bắt các quy tắc cơ bản
vocab.example: When I first joined the football club, it took me a few weeks to learn the ropes of our defensive strategies.

vocab.word: the ball is in your court
vocab.meaning: quyền quyết định thuộc về bạn/đến lượt bạn hành động
vocab.example: In the final minutes of the relay, my teammate passed me the baton, and the ball was in my court to finish strong.
Even though our opponents were much stronger, we decided to give it our best shot and play with pride.

vocab.meaning: thắng một cách dễ dàng/áp đảo
vocab.example: Thanks to our rigorous training schedule, we managed to win the regional championship hands down.

vocab.meaning: nhanh nhẹn, tinh ý, hiểu rõ vấn đề
vocab.example: Our captain was always on the ball, making split-second tactical changes that often turned the tide of the match.

vocab.meaning: thổi còi kết thúc (nghĩa đen) hoặc tố giác hành vi sai trái (nghĩa bóng)
vocab.example: I remember the exhilaration I felt every time the referee blew the whistle to signal our victory.

vocab.meaning: một khả năng rất thấp/một thử thách khó khăn
vocab.example: Winning against the defending champions was a long shot, but the experience we gained was invaluable.

vocab.meaning: tự bơi hay là chìm (tự sinh tự diệt trong môi trường khắc nghiệt)
vocab.example: Joining a high-level sports team was a sink-or-swim situation that forced me to develop a thick skin.

vocab.meaning: giữ vững tinh thần, không nản chí
vocab.example: Whenever we lost a game, our coach encouraged us to keep our chins up and focus on the next challenge.
